hooks.prompt: Check if the GITLAB_TOKEN environment variable is set. If it is NOT set or empty, proactively tell the user (in their language) that the GitLab MCP plugin needs a Personal Access Token to work. Guide them step by step: 1) Go to GitLab > Settings > Access Tokens, 2) Create a token with the 'api' scope, 3) Set it as GITLAB_TOKEN environment variable. Be friendly and concise. If GITLAB_TOKEN IS set, say nothing — do not mention it at all.
